zh.lifeSummary: Richard Done於1165年出生。他至少有2個兒子。他去世於1215年享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Done于1165年出生。他至少有2个儿子。他去世于1215年享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Done
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Alfredo, Angel, Berto, Cristobal, Dinora, Eloisa, Francisco, Generoso, Gustavo, Juan.
English: variant of Donne, itself a variant of Dunn .

variants.name: Dunn
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinn, Ó Doinn ‘descendant of Donn’, a byname meaning ‘brown-haired’ or ‘chieftain’. Compare Dunne . This name has sometimes been Anglicized as Brown .
English: nickname for a dark complexioned or swarthy man, from Middle English dun ‘dun, dark’ (Old English dunn ‘dull brown’).
Scottish: habitational name from Dun in Angus, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’. Compare Dun .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Done was born in 1165. He had at least 2 sons. He died in 1215, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Done est né en 1165. Il a eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1215, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Done wurde 1165 geboren. Er hatte mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1215 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Done è nato il nel 1165. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1215, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Doneは1165年に生まれた。彼は少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1215年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Done(은)는 1165년 태어났다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1215년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Done nasceu em 1165. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1215, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Done родился в 1165 г. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1215 г. в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Done nació en 1165. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1215, a la edad de 50 años.
